MAP.COMMENT: ===== The request for this service is built inside - GLDExpressGateway.ProcessFlows.EFW:buildSaveTransactionAssetsInput. The reason is: we need to create the list of suppliers, so that we can use it here and in the transaction save service. =====

Values.value: APP SUBMIT - TransactionAssetSave - Post to XOS
APP SUBMIT - TransactionAssetSave - Reply from XOS

SEQUENCE.COMMENT: Save Transaction Asset Details Custom Fields

BRANCH.COMMENT: Save Custom Field if Integration Code Matches
